name: New research spotlights reproductive and heart health : Dr. Kahn explains
summary: New research is drawing attention to a critical link between women’s reproductive health and long-term heart health, with studies suggesting that some common gynecological conditions may raise the risk of serious cardiovascular problems later in life.

name: Strip casino giants eyeing Wall Street exits as billionaires bet on Las Vegas’ future
summary: When billionaire Tilman Fertitta offered $17.6 billion to take Caesars Entertainment private, industry observers viewed it as a bold move by a longtime casino operator seeking control of one of gaming’s largest companies. Less than one week later, another billionaire made an even bigger bet.

name: I Tried Rips, the Card-Pack App Where Users Spend Thousands Chasing Pricey Pokémon
summary: I ripped open $892 worth of Pokémon packs on my phone in under 15 minutes and walked away with 62 cents. My adrenaline rush felt like the future of gambling.

name: Addiction 33: Shane Kraus on Veteran addiction issues
summary: Another double-header from the UNLV Risk and Gambling conference, this time we talk with Shane Kraus about gambling addiction among the armed forces, and among veterans. It’s an enlightening field of study, and we hope to welcome Shane back on the podcast soon to talk more on this.

name: Las Vegas advocates react following Supreme Court birthright citizenship ruling
summary: Immigrant advocates and educators in Southern Nevada respond to the ruling hours after the decision.

name: Mornings With Simi: Music listening habits
summary: Psychologists have been doing research on if there is a definitive answer on whether it is a good or bad idea to listen to music while studying. Bridget Daleiden from the Department of Educational Psychology Leadership and Higher Education at the University of Nevada, Las Vegas has joined to answer.

name: Recommendations released to address student traffic safety after 427 students hit by cars
summary: 427 students were hit while going to and from school last year in Clark County. Four of those students died. Clark County leaders are rolling out a new plan to get students to and from school every day safely.

name: Terrible's takes over management of Primm properties beginning July 1
summary: Primm’s last operating casino shut down June 29, 2026, marking another major turning point for the tiny border town after months of uncertainty about whether it could keep its doors open at all.

name: Business Indicators: July 2026
summary: The United States is experiencing continued growth with largely positive economic signals from several key indicators.
